pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 11 creates file at this path
setup_task.sh line 54 creates file at this path
export_result.sh line 112 expects SVG at this path
setup_task.sh creates Context Diagram (line 15); task description specifies the other two required pages
patient_system_spec.txt (lines 59-86 of setup_task.sh) defines all 5 Level-0 processes: Patient Registration, Appointment Scheduling, Clinical Documentation, Billing and Claims, Pharmacy Management
patient_system_spec.txt (lines 88-106 of setup_task.sh) defines all 4 Level-1 sub-processes: Charge Capture, Claims Generation, Payment Processing, Denial Management
patient_system_spec.txt defines all 5 data stores: D1 (Patient Records), D2 (Appointment Log), D3 (Clinical Notes), D4 (Billing Records), D5 (Prescription Database)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves decomposing a hospital patient management system Context Diagram into a Level-0 DFD with 5 main processes (1.0-5.0) and corresponding data stores (D1-D5), and a Level-1 DFD decomposing Process 4.0 (Billing) into 4 sub-processes (4.1-4.4). The input diagram is created at /home/ga/Diagrams/hospital_dfd.drawio, the specification is at /home/ga/Desktop/patient_system_spec.txt, and the expected SVG export is at /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/hospital_dfd.svg. All required pages, processes, and data stores are correctly specified in the task metadata.
